title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera sets up a prank in order to scare Rinky-Pinky on her birthday. But when the prank makes her cry, Titoo decides to give Shera a taste of his own medicine.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo causes a water crisis in his entire building after turning off the water pump. So, his parents tell him to ask before doing anything but soon get annoyed when he asks too many questions.

title: Titoo
subTitle: To annoy Titoo, Shera throws water on his homework, ruining it completely. But Titoo tells Shera's father about what he did and makes sure that Shera is punished.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo gets annoyed when his mother does not allow him to watch his cartoons as she wants to watch a soap opera. So he comes up with a plan to make her stop watching soap operas.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera puts something in Golu's drink to make him lose his voice before the town singing competition. But when Titoo comes to know about this, he steps in to save Golu from embarrassment.

subTitle: Titoo and his friends enter into a kite competition where they try different ways to beat their opponents. However, things take a turn when the winners are announced.

subTitle: During the Holi celebrations, Shera is challenged to a spirited watercolour competition by Titoo. But soon chaos ensues as they both go all out to win.

subTitle: Shera's cousin transfers to his school and starts troubling him. However, Shera tries different ways to make his cousin to trouble Titoo and his brother instead.

subTitle: Titoo fakes being ill in order to go to a movie premiere instead of school. But his mother thinks he is deathly ill and decides to admit him to the hospital.

subTitle: During a friendly game of cricket between Shera and Titoo, Shera is knocked unconscious. But when he wakes up he seems to think that he is a five-year-old boy.
